Name: Cachetrax
Tagline: Hash-indexed object cache with O(1) lookups, time and size based expiration, and custom pruning strategies
Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="frame-cachetrax-filled-light">
				<path d="M 48.00 2.00 L 87.84 25.00 L 87.84 71.00 L 48.00 94.00 L 8.16 71.00 L 8.16 25.00 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 48.00 2.00 L 87.84 25.00 L 87.84 71.00 L 48.00 94.00 L 8.16 71.00 L 8.16 25.00 Z" fill="#36bbdc"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-cachetrax-filled-light)"><circle cx="40.5" cy="48" r="30" fill="#d78255" opacity="0.85"/>
					<circle cx="55.5" cy="48" r="30" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.32)" opacity="0.95"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="56" font-weight="600"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">C</text>
	</svg>
